name: Hash Brown Breakfast Quiche
recipeIngredient: -Condensed Cream of Chicken Soup or Reduced Fat Cream of Chicken Soup
1 cup (4 ounces) shredded sharp Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the hash browns, green onions, butter, and 1/2 teaspoon ground black pepper. Press into the bottom and up the sides of a greased 10-inch quiche dish or tart pan.
2. Bake at 425°F for 25 minutes or until lightly browned around the edges. Let cool for 10 minutes.
3. Combine the remaining 1/2 teaspoon pepper, soup, and next 5 ingredients (eggs, shredded cheese, ham, green bell pepper) in a bowl, stirring well.
4. Pour evenly into the prepared crust.
5. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes or until set. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
Note: Frozen hash browns with onions and peppers may be substituted for hash browns and green onions. Thaw hash browns quickly in a microwave on defrost cycle or let stand in the refrigerator overnight.
